name: Sam Kinison
blurb: The scream — rock-and-roll rage as comedy.
bio: Sam Kinison, a former Pentecostal preacher, brought the pulpit's roar to comedy, his trademark scream detonating bits on marriage, religion, and world hunger. Rock-and-roll rage as stand-up, gone at 38 in a car crash.

timeline.ev: Breaks out on Rodney Dangerfield's Young Comedians special

accolades: Breakout on Rodney Dangerfield's HBO special (1985)
Grammy nomination for Have You Seen Me Lately?
A defining voice of 1980s shock comedy
